data.title: BIS Calls for Enhanced Global Regulation of Stablecoins
data.description:
The Bank for International Settlements (BIS) has urged for stronger global regulatory cooperation on stablecoins to prevent significant market fragmentation. According to Foresight News, BIS General Manager Pablo Hernandez de Cos emphasized the need for unified regulations during a speech in Japan. Currently, the global circulation of stablecoins is approximately $315 billion, with Tether and Circle accounting for about 85% of the market.

Hernandez de Cos highlighted the risks associated with stablecoins, including their potential to undermine monetary and fiscal policies, create market stress, and facilitate illegal financing. He noted that stablecoins operate more like exchange-traded funds (ETFs) rather than traditional currencies. He warned that regulatory differences across jurisdictions could lead to regulatory arbitrage.

To mitigate the risk of runs, Hernandez de Cos suggested measures such as granting issuers access to deposit insurance or central bank lending facilities. Additionally, he proposed prohibiting interest payments on stablecoins to reduce the flow of bank deposits into these digital assets.

data.title: SKYAI Experiences Sharp Decline, Drops Over 50%
data.description: SKYAI has experienced a significant drop, falling over 50% in a short period. According to Odaily, the current price is reported at $0.1.

data.title: India's Truck Fleet Operators Face Fuel Rationing and Diesel Price Surge
data.description: Operators of truck fleets across India are preparing for potential fuel rationing and a substantial rise in diesel prices. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by the industry amid these developments. The anticipated changes are expected to impact logistics and transportation costs significantly, affecting businesses reliant on road transport. Industry experts are closely monitoring the situation, as the potential fuel restrictions and price hikes could have widespread economic implications. Truck fleet operators are urged to strategize and adapt to the evolving circumstances to mitigate the impact on their operations.

data.title: SKYAI briefly fell by more than 50%, and is currently trading at $0.10.
data.description: Market data shows that SKYAI fell by more than 50% in a short period of time and is currently trading at $0.1.

data.title: PUNK's market capitalization surpasses $14 million, a more than 3300-fold increase in a single day.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of PUNK, the Meme coin on the Ethereum blockchain, has surged past $14 million, currently trading at $13.3 million, representing a daily increase of over 3300 times. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Tsunami Warning Issued in Japan Following 7.5-Magnitude Earthquake
data.description: A tsunami warning has been issued in Japan after a powerful 7.5-magnitude earthquake struck off the northern coast, according to the national meteorological agency. CNN Breaking News posted on X, highlighting the potential threat to coastal areas. Residents in affected regions are advised to stay alert and follow any evacuation orders from local authorities. The earthquake's epicenter was located offshore, and the tremor was felt across a wide area. Emergency services are on standby to respond to any incidents resulting from the quake. Further updates will be provided as more information becomes available.

data.title: Sharplink Gaming CEO Sees Ethereum Price Correction as Long-Term Opportunity
data.description: Sharplink Gaming CEO Joseph Chalom has expressed optimism about Ethereum's current price correction, suggesting it presents a favorable long-term entry point for investors. According to NS3.AI, Chalom highlighted that Sharplink's digital asset treasury model benefits from Ethereum's growth and can leverage staking revenue during market downturns.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Whale Alert has reported the minting of 250 million USDC at the USDC Treasury. This development is significant in the cryptocurrency market as it may influence liquidity and trading activities. The minting of such a large amount of USDC could be indicative of increased demand or preparation for upcoming transactions. Market participants will be closely monitoring the impact of this minting on the broader crypto market.

data.title: OKX Global Business Officer Lennix: AI Agents will reshape transaction models, and Onchain OS will build the underlying infrastructure.
data.description: On April 20th, Lennix, Global Business Officer of OKX, was invited to attend the "2026 Hong Kong Web3 Carnival" summit. He delivered a keynote speech entitled "Start building on Onchain OS" at the main forum, sharing the design philosophy and development direction of OKX Onchain OS from multiple dimensions, including the impact of AI Agents on transaction models, the construction of on-chain operating systems, and the evolution of Web3 infrastructure. Lennix stated that with the rapid development of large-scale models and AI Agents, users are beginning to use agents to complete market monitoring, signal generation, and strategy execution, leading to changes in trading behavior. However, the industry currently lacks an infrastructure that can balance execution efficiency and security, allowing AI Agents to truly participate in on-chain interactions and operations while ensuring user control. He further pointed out that Onchain OS is an on-chain operating system built for this purpose. By integrating transaction, data, security, and settlement capabilities, it enables AI Agents to complete decision-making and execution within a unified framework. Simultaneously, with increased collaboration between Agents and between Agents and humans, the future market will gradually evolve from "human-to-system" interaction to a "multi-entity collaborative" network structure. Lennix stated that an open ecosystem and infrastructure will be key in this process, giving every user the opportunity to access capabilities comparable to those of professional organizations through AI Agents, thereby reshaping how the entire Web3 ecosystem is participated in.

data.title: Decentralized contract trading platform SunWukong launches META and AAPL perpetual contracts
data.description: According to official social media reports, the Chinese decentralized contract trading platform Sun Wukong has now listed META/USDT and AAPL/USDT, with a maximum leverage of 20x for both.

data.title: SharpLink CEO Predicts Future of Digital Wallets and AI Agents
data.description:
SharpLink CEO Joseph Chalom, formerly the head of digital assets at BlackRock, shared insights at the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Carnival. According to Foresight News, Chalom highlighted his experience in the crypto industry, noting that he has witnessed 5-6 cycles of significant rises and falls over the past eight years. He emphasized that after each downturn, the market reaches new highs, with quality projects surviving while lesser ones are eliminated. Chalom pointed out the unique aspect of Digital Asset Treasury (DAT), where Ethereum's price increases lead to stock price rises, and even during downturns, staking can maintain Ethereum's 'productivity.' Since October last year, the prices of BTC, ETH, and SOL have significantly retracted. Although short-term price predictions are challenging, the current risk-reward ratio is the best it has been in a long time.

Looking ahead, Chalom predicted that in 3-5 years, most people will possess a new type of digital wallet, which users may not even recognize as a 'crypto wallet.' Brokerage accounts will transform into on-chain wallets, and bank accounts will incorporate on-chain components. He also foresees that most individuals will have a 'digital twin' AI agent to manage tasks such as depositing salaries, allocating year-end bonuses according to preferences, and even performing quarterly rebalancing. These agents, which do not sleep or make mistakes, will align their incentives with users. The machine economy of agents will integrate into daily life, much like ordering food via smartphones today, with most activities occurring on the most secure and trusted blockchain, Ethereum.

Chalom expressed concerns about two main issues: the increasing correlation between crypto assets and tech stocks, which complicates explaining their unique value to investors, and the need for improved security standards within the ecosystem.

data.title: VIX Index Rises After Eight-Day Decline
data.description: The VIX Index, a key measure of market volatility, has increased by 2.43 points to 19.91, marking its highest level in a week. According to BlockBeats, this rise follows an eight-day period of decline.

data.title: Iran Cites U.S. Violations as Barrier to Hormuz Strait Traffic Restoration
data.description: On April 20, Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson, Baghaei, stated that unilateral restoration of normal traffic in the Hormuz Strait is impossible due to ceasefire violations by the United States and threats to Iranian ports and vessels. According to BlockBeats, these developments underscore ongoing tensions between the two nations, impacting regional maritime operations.

data.title: Strategy Proposes Bi-Monthly STRC Dividend Plan
data.description: Strategy has announced a new bi-monthly dividend plan for STRC. According to Odaily, CEO Phong Le stated that the company will increase the frequency of STRC dividends while maintaining the same 11.5% yield, effectively doubling the payout frequency.

data.title: Victory Macro Technology Sees Over 60% Surge in Grey Market Trading
data.description: Victory Macro Technology (02476.HK) experienced a significant increase in its grey market trading, with shares rising over 60%. According to Jin10, this surge comes ahead of the company's official listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The strong performance in the grey market indicates positive investor sentiment and anticipation for the company's market debut. Victory Macro Technology's impressive pre-listing performance highlights the growing interest in new stock offerings within the Hong Kong market.

data.title: Hyperliquid Contributor Opens Significant Short Position on HYPE
data.description:
On April 20, Hyperinsight monitoring revealed that in the past 10 minutes, the address 'Hyperliquid Early Contributor Loracle' (0x8def...) initiated a 5x leveraged short position on HYPE, amounting to 29,000 units, valued at approximately $1.2 million, with an average price of $41.04. According to BlockBeats, this position remains active near the same price level at the time of reporting.

The address belongs to an early contributor to the Hyperliquid ecosystem and is associated with the founder of Hypurrfun. Previously, during the main upward surge of HYPE from $20, the contributor significantly increased long positions, with the scale once exceeding $40 million.

data.title: A whale withdrew 10,829 ETH from Aave and sold them, making a profit of $2.41 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, following the rsETH incident yesterday morning, a whale withdrew 10,829 ETH from Aave, worth approximately $24.91 million. They subsequently sold all the ETH today at $2,300 per ETH, obtaining approximately 24.91 million USDC, realizing a profit of approximately $2.41 million. This ETH was initially purchased in March at $2,081 per ETH.

data.title: Iran's Foreign Ministry denies second round of talks; US oil company stocks rise in pre-market trading.
data.description: According to Gate data, the Iranian Foreign Ministry denied a second round of negotiations, and US oil company stocks rose in pre-market trading. Exxon Mobil rose 2%, Chevron rose 1.5%, and ConocoPhillips rose 2.7%. Diamondback Energy rose 2.6%, Devon Energy rose 2.6%, and Occidental Petroleum rose 2.5%.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry: Transfer of enriched uranium has never been mentioned
data.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baghae stated: "The topic of transferring Iran's enriched uranium stockpile to the United States or any other country has never been mentioned in any phase of negotiations, either now or in the past. This option is simply not on the agenda of the Islamic Republic of Iran. The country's firm position is to retain its nuclear achievements on Iranian territory, and rumors in this area have been completely denied." (Jinshi)

data.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry Denies Second Round of Talks, U.S. Oil Stocks Rise
data.description: The Iranian Foreign Ministry has denied reports of a second round of negotiations, leading to a pre-market rise in U.S. oil company stocks. According to Jin10, ExxonMobil shares increased by 2%, Chevron rose by 1.5%, and ConocoPhillips saw a 2.7% uptick. Additionally, Diamondback Energy and Devon Energy both experienced a 2.6% increase, while Occidental Petroleum's shares went up by 2.5%.
